arts.sum: Lens are enjoying a solid Ligue 1 season. Will Still’s side went into the winter break seventh in France’s top tier, three points off the European places, and with the joint-best defensive...

arts.ttl: 'A lot of work' - Ruben Amorim gives honest opinion about his Manchester United rebuild
arts.sum: Man Utd are back in Premier League action on Monday night and will play their final game of 2025 against Newcastle.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United coach Jason Tindall told fate after red card against Aston Villa
arts.sum: Tindall was sent to the stands in the 3-0 win over Villa after a half-time tunnel melee along with Villa analyst Victor Manas. Speaking after the game, Eddie Howe offered an eyewitness account to what happened, saying: "I don't think it's far off [a mass melee].

arts.ttl: Leicester contact Man Utd about January loan deal
arts.sum: Leicester City manager Ruud van Nistelrooy has reportedly contacted his former club Manchester Untied about potential loan signings for the January transfer window. The Foxes are currently in the relegation zone after three consecutive Premier League defeats, with new manager Van Nistelrooy struggling to turn things around as some might have hoped. arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson's first name on Man Utd teamsheet is perfect reminder for Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim can learn a number of lessons from Sir Alex Ferguson, including one about the only player he deemed a "certainty" to make his all-time XI

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim strikes confident tone despite woeful Man Utd form ahead of huge Newcastle clash
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim delivered an upbeat message to supporters ahead of his side's year-ending Premier League clash with Newcastle.

arts.ttl: Revealed: Newcastle favourites to seal quality transfer for just €38m this January
arts.sum: Newcastle United are looking in a strong position to clinch the potential transfer of AC Milan defender Fikayo Tomori this January, CaughtOffside understands. The former Chelsea defender is understood to be keen on a potential return to the Premier League, and Newcastle are looking into his situation as his Milan future looks in major doubt. arts.ttl: Full list of 82 Premier League stars free to talk to clubs on January 1 including Mo Salah
arts.sum: The January transfer window opens on Wednesday and Mo Salah, like two of his Liverpool team-mates, Virgil van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold, will be able to sign a pre-contract agreement with another club
Footy Headlines can leak the main colorway of Manchester United Football Club's 2025-26 goalkeeper kit in Pro version.

arts.ttl: I'm a Manchester United fan and Newcastle United 'worry me' as they visit Old Trafford
arts.sum: While Man United are struggling to find their form under the new manager with players lacking that spark, Newcastle's stars have found their feet with Alexander Isak hitting 10 in his last 10 league games, Anthony Gordon looking like his old self but it is the midfield trio of Bruno Guimaraes, Joelinton and a certain Italian that has caught the eye. Throw in the fact that two of United's most influential players, Bruno Fernandes and Manuel Ugarte are missing on Monday night due to suspension, it's perhaps no surprise that Man United fans are a feeling a little cautious about the clash - even if Newcastle have just won twice at Old Trafford in the last 50-odd years.
